name: io.github.jrelph/ripe-atlas
title: RIPE Atlas
description: MCP server for the RIPE Atlas network measurement platform — create ping, traceroute, DNS, TLS, HTTP, and NTP measurements, retrieve results, and search probes worldwide.

environmentVariables.name: RIPE_ATLAS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: RIPE Atlas API key with 'create measurement' permission. Get one at https://atlas.ripe.net/keys/
